description: Designed for everyday use, this messenger bag from wrangler is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. With ample space to stash away daily belongings, it makes for a perfect bag to college as well as work.Made of canvas with complete protective nylon lining for easy cleaning and durabilityThree fabric compartments with branded zippers wrangler logo printed in distressed print on a sub-chamberWide adjustable strap to customise lengthLeather patchwork below the base for added durability and structureCareDo not washDo not dry-cleanUse mild brush to dust if necessary
